steps.chat: Create a training operations app called Training Operations with courses, attendees, due dates, reminders, completion certificates, automated overdue follow-ups, and rich action buttons.
Create a cookbook app called Cookbook Studio to manage recipes, pantry ingredients, cookbook drafts, and action buttons for testing, approving, and publishing recipes.

Create a vendor approvals app called Vendor Approvals with draft, approved, and rejected statuses, make Review Notes required when the record is rejected, show Contract End Date only when the vendor is approved, and include a draft approval notification automation.
In Sales, when a quote is approved, create a Job in Jobs, copy the customer and site details from Contacts, and notify the coordinator.
In Jobs, when a job is completed, generate a completion pack in Documents, attach the service report PDF, and mark the customer follow-up in Contacts.

Create a field service app called Field Service Control with jobs, technicians, parts used, service reports, customer signatures, scheduling, statuses, action buttons, and documents like an Odoo-style operational module.
When a CRM lead becomes qualified, add the flow to create a draft quote in Sales and carry over contact details from Contacts.
In Jobs, when the status is Completed require Completion Notes and Customer Sign Off, and only show Follow-up Date when Follow-up Required is checked.
In Sales, create an approval email template that thanks the customer, shows the approved quote number, lists the next steps, and is ready to send when the quote is approved.
In Jobs, create a service report PDF template using Jinja placeholders for customer, site, technician, work completed, materials used, and sign-off.
In Contacts, remove the outdated internal reference field if it exists and keep the rest of the form intact.
Create a simple module for managing gym training sessions. Call it Neetones. Make it clean and modern.
Create a simple module to track vehicle usage, odometer readings, drivers, and notes. Call it Vehicle Logbook.
Create a simple module to manage tools, serial numbers, assigned staff, service dates, and condition. Call it Tool Register.
Create a simple module to manage site visits, visit dates, customer, outcome, and notes. Call it Site Visits.
Create a simple module to manage purchase requests, requester, amount, supplier, and notes. Call it Purchase Requests.
Create a simple module for employee expense claims with date, amount, category, receipt, and status. Call it Expense Claims.
Create a simple module to track visitors, visit time, host, company, and sign out. Call it Visitor Sign In.
Create a simple module to manage contractor inductions, expiry dates, company, contact, and notes. Call it Contractor Inductions.
Create a simple module for stocktakes with location, count date, counted by, variance, and notes. Call it Stocktake Hub.
Create a simple module for leave requests with employee, dates, leave type, status, and manager notes. Call it Leave Requests.
Create a simple module to track staff training, provider, due date, completion date, and certificate notes. Call it Staff Training.
Create a simple module to log safety incidents with date, severity, location, people involved, and follow up. Call it Safety Incidents.
Create a simple module for meeting notes with meeting title, date, attendees, decisions, and action notes. Call it Meeting Notes.
Create a simple module to manage shift handovers with date, outgoing staff, incoming staff, summary, and issues. Call it Shift Handover.
Create a simple module to manage kitchen prep lists with item, prep date, station, status, and notes. Call it Kitchen Prep.
Create a simple module to manage meals, planned date, meal type, ingredients summary, and notes. Call it Meal Planner.
Create a simple module to manage delivery runs with driver, date, route, vehicle, and notes. Call it Delivery Runs.
Create a simple module to manage equipment hire with customer, item, out date, due date, and notes. Call it Equipment Hire.
Create a simple module to manage room bookings with room, booking date, organiser, purpose, and notes. Call it Room Bookings.
Create a simple module to manage vendor reviews with supplier, review date, score, owner, and notes. Call it Vendor Reviews.
Create a simple module to manage client onboarding checklists with client, owner, target date, status, and notes. Call it Client Onboarding.
Create a simple module to manage warranty claims with customer, product, claim date, status, and notes. Call it Warranty Claims.
Create a simple module to manage service recalls with asset, recall date, owner, priority, and notes. Call it Service Recalls.
Create a simple module to manage quality audits with audit date, auditor, score, finding summary, and notes. Call it Quality Audits.
Create a simple module to manage supplier scorecards with supplier, review date, rating, owner, and notes. Call it Supplier Scorecards.
Create a simple module to manage fuel logs with vehicle, date, litres, cost, and notes. Call it Fuel Logs.
Create a simple module to manage travel requests with employee, destination, dates, purpose, and notes. Call it Travel Requests.
Create a simple module to manage audit actions with title, owner, due date, status, and notes. Call it Audit Actions.
Create a simple module to manage branch targets with branch, period, target, owner, and notes. Call it Branch Targets.
Create a simple module to manage fleet checks with vehicle, check date, driver, result, and notes. Call it Fleet Checks.
Create a simple module to track volunteer hours with volunteer, date, hours, activity, and notes. Call it Volunteer Hours.
Create a simple module to manage membership renewals with member, renewal date, plan, status, and notes. Call it Membership Renewals.
Create a simple module to manage workshop bookings with customer, asset, booking date, technician, and notes. Call it Workshop Bookings.
Create a simple module to manage product returns with customer, product, return date, reason, and notes. Call it Returns Processing.
Create a simple module to manage event run sheets with event, date, owner, venue, and notes. Call it Event Run Sheets.
Create a maintenance requests module called Maintenance Requests with statuses New, In Progress, Waiting Parts, Done, and actions to move between those stages.
Create a module called Time Off Approvals with request status Draft, Submitted, Approved, Declined, and actions for submit, approve, and decline.
Create a module called Purchase Approval Desk with draft, submitted, approved, rejected statuses and approval actions based on status.
Create a module called Incident Response with severity, status flow Open, Investigating, Contained, Closed, and actions to move the status.
Create a module called Vehicle Service Schedule with planned, booked, completed statuses and date-driven scheduling views.
Create a module called Audit Findings with statuses Open, Actioned, Verified, Closed and owner-based follow-up actions.
Create a module called Stock Replenishment with statuses Draft, Pending Approval, Ordered, Received and actions for approve and receive.
Create a recruitment module called Candidate Pipeline with stage flow Applied, Screen, Interview, Offer, Hired and kanban-first pipeline support.
Create a module called Training Compliance with due, booked, completed, overdue statuses and reminder-friendly date views.
Create a module called Site Defects with status flow Reported, Assigned, In Repair, Resolved and actions for assign and resolve.
Create a module called Tool Checkout with statuses Available, Checked Out, Overdue, Returned and actions to check out and return.
Create a module called Capital Requests with draft, review, approved, rejected statuses and approval actions.
Create a module called Change Requests with draft, submitted, approved, implemented statuses and action buttons for each stage.
Create a module called Repair Queue with queue status New, Diagnosed, Waiting Approval, Repairing, Complete and list plus kanban views.
Create a module called Onboarding Tasks with statuses To Do, In Progress, Done, owner assignment, due dates, and approval-style closeout actions.
Create a Holiday Planner module to manage upcoming trips, travellers, booking dates, budgets, suppliers, and notes. Call it Holiday Planner.
Build a Customer Site Assets module so we can track equipment installed at each customer site, serial numbers, warranty dates, service history, and photos.
Create a Warranty Claims module for faulty products, claim dates, supplier responses, replacement status, and customer updates.
Create a Job Hazard Analysis module to record hazards, controls, responsible people, review dates, and signoff before work starts.
Make an Employee Onboarding module with start date, manager, equipment checklist, training steps, payroll status, and notes.
Create a Fleet Defects module to log vehicle defects, severity, reported by, due date, workshop booking, and resolution notes.
Create a Tool Calibration module for calibration dates, next due date, certificate uploads, vendor, and status.
Create a Service Agreements module to track contract start and end dates, renewal terms, pricing, service level, and account owner.
Build a Rental Checklists module for pre-hire checks, return inspections, damages, photos, and signoff.
Create a Room Turnovers module to manage checkout cleanups, assigned staff, inspection status, linen issues, and ready-for-next-guest time.
Create a Vendor Compliance module for insurance expiry, safety docs, onboarding status, approved categories, and review notes.
Create an Incident Investigations module with incident link, investigator, root cause, corrective actions, due dates, and closure signoff.
